nasb.text: In a dream, a vision of the night, When sound sleep falls on men, While they slumber in their beds,

esv.text: In a dream, in a vision of the night, when deep sleep falls on men, while they slumber on their beds,

cnv.text: 世人都在床上打盹， 沉睡臨到他們的時候， 　神用異夢與夜間的異象，

ccb.text: 人躺在床上沉睡时， 在梦境和夜间的异象中，
